Title

[Bug] Short description of issue

Summary
Describe the issue.

Environment

Environment: Production / Staging / Development
Browser/App Version:
OS:
User Role:

Steps to Reproduce

Go to...
Click...
Enter...
Observe...

Expected Behavior
What should happen?

Actual Behavior
What actually happens?

Impact

How many users are affected?

Screenshots / Logs
Attach screenshots, error messages, logs, or recordings.

Workaround
If known, describe any workaround.

Acceptance Criteria for Fix

[ ]Issue no longer reproducible
[ ]Regression testing completed
[ ]Related tests added/updated
